title: Project One
subtitle: E-Commerce Platform
description: A fully responsive e-commerce platform built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Features include user authentication, product search, and a complete checkout flow.

title: Project Two
subtitle: Task Management App
description: A drag-and-drop task management tool using React and Node.js. It helps teams organize their work efficiently with real-time updates.

title: Project Three
subtitle: AI Chatbot Interface
description: An intuitive chatbot interface integrating OpenAI API. Built with smooth animations and dynamic components for an enhanced user experience.

title: Project Four
subtitle: Portfolio Template
description: A modern and minimalistic portfolio template designed for developers and designers to showcase their work effectively.

title: Project Five
subtitle: Crypto Dashboard
description: A real-time cryptocurrency tracking dashboard featuring live WebSocket data feeds, interactive WebGL charts, and portfolio management tools.

title: Project Six
subtitle: Neural Style Transfer
description: A deep learning application that applies the stylistic elements of famous artworks to user-uploaded photos using TensorFlow.js in the browser.

title: Project Seven
subtitle: Design System UI
description: A comprehensive React component library and design system built with Storybook, featuring accessible components and a sleek, customizable token system.

title: Project Eight
subtitle: Spatial Audio Engine
description: An experimental Web Audio API application for producing 3D binaural soundscapes in real-time, designed for immersive web experiences.

title: Project Nine
subtitle: Generative Art Canvas
description: A WebGL-powered generative art platform that creates infinite, evolving landscapes based on mathematical noise algorithms.
